Understand Wikiwiki without reading raw records.

Featured

High-signal knowledge

Decision

Make generated sites project-first

Render generated sites as the user project wiki first: use project identity in titles and navigation, keep only a small Created with Wikiwiki footer...

siteuxhuman-wikithemehomepage
DecisionFor everyone

Use deterministic wiki profiles for first-pass seeding

Add user, developer, and mixed wiki profiles that define target record counts, audience tags, page emphasis, and stable first-pass seed templates.

productdogfoodprofilesdocs
Decision

Compile UX and DX human wikis through agent-mediated drafts

Generate both UX and DX compile drafts by default, let the active IDE agent author the prose, then validate and publish the result with wk compile...

compileuxdxagent-workflowagentic-ide
Decision

Generate a static HTML site for human wiki browsing

Add wk site as a separate static site generator that reads structured records, preserves wk render Markdown output, and writes a browsable wiki-site/...

siteuxdxhuman-wikistatic
Decision

Make generated sites publishable without adjacent repo files

Support .wikiwiki/config.json source_base_url and wk site --source-base-url, with CLI override winning; use remote source URLs when configured and...

sitegithub-pagessource-linksdx
Decision

Support script-first wiki automation

Position Wikiwiki as a deterministic CLI and scriptable wiki generator first, with optional agentic IDE instructions that expand record capture...
